title: CobbleWeb
description: HERES COME THE COBBLEWEB,a cobblemon server with many mods like tornadoes,webdisplays,mr crayfish's gun mod also if it used for violence banned from the server,mega evolutions like you can do anything here, also protect your house,come play and have fun :D
body: COME AND PARTICIPATE ON COBBLEWEB THE MOST UNIQUE AND COOL COBBLEMON WITH MUCH MODS example: web displays,mrcrayfish's gun mod also dont use it for violance or anything that simulates assault,robbing etc,if used like that permanent ban,tornadoes and the main mod Webdisplays much more mods so come and have fun :D
